name: Bad Boy Supreme, Super-sized Mcshizzle, Leonidas Valdez.
description:
Trying out styles...

Requested by: Boobies_menn101

Leo: "Ptsd! Anxiety! Crippling depression, there is no question, you should kill me!"

Nico: "I volunteer."

Leo: "Let me be with Harambe! I feel like shit everyday! I'm asking nicely, do it by drowning, under the sea!"

The World's Greatest Actor

Doesn't need a stage

'Cause they're so good at their craft

That nobody knows they're fake!

The fools have no clue

What they knew was just a fraud

The master of pretending

To be something that they're not.

"Humor was a good way to hide the pain."
creator: Party_Poison666
